name: Exchange Student | Alix Desrosiers
description:
Distance never stopped people from falling in love so why would a language barrier stop Alix?

omfg it took me so long to come up with an intro idea for this bot like this bot was supposed to be out during February, ITS APRIL 💀

Side note I do not know a lick of French and his intro was made with the help of google translate so if something is worded wrong let me know 😅
